recap: Created no-manual-mock-cleanup ESLint rule that errors on redundant vi.restoreAllMocks/clearAllMocks/resetAllMocks calls with config-specific messages
Created prefer-mock-return-value ESLint rule that autofixes mockResolvedValue/mockRejectedValue to mockReturnValue, migrated 5 violations in 4 files
Enabled vitest/no-importing-vitest-globals rule in vitest ESLint config, no existing violations
